1.0.0.description:
# Back in business baby!

## Changelog

- Created an official website for AP Bingo (https://cynichill.github.io/APBingoWeb/)
- The website supports Fog of war, Link copying, Auto-hinting, Player searching, and sending checks!
- The website also changes the tab title to reflect your slotname to help masochists keep track of multiple bingos

- Expanded max bingo board size from 10x10 to 26x26
- Added Fog of War, a new option where a random square starts revealed, when a square is found, adjacent squares are revealed (Does not affect logic)
- Auto-hinting with fog of war hints squares as they are revealed
- Columns are now letters, and rows are now numbers
1.0.0.title: APBingo 1.0.0

1.0.1.description:
## I did a whoopsie.

- Fixed a bug where large boards generated without the correct amount of locations
1.0.1.title: AP Bingo 1.0.1

1.1.0.description:
## World Changelog

- Added 'Additional Bingos', these are new patterns which will send a bingo, includes 'Blackout', 'Corners', 'Picture Frame', 'Checkerboard' and 'Reverse Checkerboard'
- Moved 'Bingo ALL' to 'Blackout' as an additional bingo
- Upped minimum board size to 4x4 
- Added additional bingos into 'required bingos' logic

## Site Changelog
- Added support for new bingos
- Added sounds for achieving a bingo and goaling

## Known Issues
- Games generated on previous versions will not send 'Bingo ALL' on the site, please send this manually if needed. Not an issue with games generated with the new APWorld
1.1.0.title: APBingo 1.1.0
